briefs.title: Solar Panel Racking Systems and Foundations Exempt from School Tax in BC
briefs.summary: Effective December 31, 2025, BC's new School Tax Exemptions (Solar Power Projects) Regulation exempts racking systems and their foundations used in photovoltaic solar projects from school taxes.
briefs.action_required: Review your solar project assets and apply the school tax exemption to qualifying racking systems and foundations from December 31, 2025.

key_dates.label: BC School Tax Exemptions (Solar Power Projects) Regulation takes effect
